zh.lifeSummary: 當Anice de Cromwell於1363年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾時，她的父親Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell25歲，母親Maud de Bernacke26歲。她於1382年7月8日與Thomas Bardolf 5th Baron Bardolf在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾帕茨 本 林賽結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1421年7月1日在英國素可享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anice de Cromwell于1363年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾时，她的父亲Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell25岁，母亲Maud de Bernacke26岁。她于1382年7月8日与Thomas Bardolf 5th Baron Bardolf在英国英格兰林可爾史爾帕茨 本 林賽结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1421年7月1日在英国素可享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cromwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place so named in Nottinghamshire, from Old English crumb ‘bent, crooked’ + well(a) ‘spring, stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Anice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern coinage, apparently from the name of the aniseed plant (Old French anis, from Latin and Greek). For other modern first names derived from spices, see Clove and Juniper . It is possible that it was influenced by the medieval first name Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Anice de Cromwell was born in 1363, in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell, was 25 and her mother, Maud de Bernacke, was 26. She married Thomas Bardolf 5th Baron Bardolf on 8 July 1382, in Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 1 July 1421, in Sussex, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England: Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anice de Cromwell est née en 1363, à Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Maud de Bernacke, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Bardolf 5th Baron Bardolf le 8 juillet 1382, à Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 juillet 1421, à Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England: Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Anice de Cromwell 1363 in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell 25 und ihre Mutter Maud de Bernacke 26. Sie hat am 8. Juli 1382 in Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Bardolf 5th Baron Bardolf geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Juli 1421 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Sussex, England und wurde in Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England: Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Quando Anice de Cromwell è nata il nel 1363 nel Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Maud de Bernacke, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Bardolf 5th Baron Bardolf il 8 luglio 1382, nel Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 1 luglio 1421, nel Sussex, England, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, England: イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアクロムウエル
ja.lifeSummary: Anice de Cromwellが1363年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアタッテルシャルで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwellは25歳，母Maud de Bernackeは26歳であった。1382年7月8日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアパーツ オフ リンドセイでThomas Bardolf 5th Baron Bardolfと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1421年7月1日にイギリススセックスで58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススセックスにて埋葬された。

ko.Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 파르츠 프 린지
ko.lifeSummary: Anice de Cromwell(이)가 1363년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 타터샤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Bernacke(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1382년 7월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 파르츠 프 린지에서 Thomas Bardolf 5th Baron Bardolf(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1421년 7월 1일 영국 수세스에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에 묻혔다.

pt.Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England: Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anice de Cromwell nasceu em 1363, em Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Bernacke, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Bardolf 5th Baron Bardolf em 8 de julho de 1382, em Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de julho de 1421, em Sussex, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England: парц оф линдси, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anice de Cromwell родилась в 1363 г. в местности таттиршолл, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Bernacke, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Bardolf 5th Baron Bardolf 8 июля 1382 г. в местности парц оф линдси, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 1 июля 1421 г. в местности суссекс, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anice de Cromwell nació en 1363, en Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Maud de Bernacke, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Thomas Bardolf 5th Baron Bardolf el 8 de julio de 1382, en Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 1 de julio de 1421, en Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
